notes: This ledger is the mechanical NURTURE shared-stack gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.
A company clears only when SkillOS, flywheel, JSM, @zeststream/* packages, and brand voice components are all present with receipt refs.
This gate is stricter than the substrate-share package receipt.
